CustomField.formula:
IF(MONTH(Order__r.Order_Date__c ) = 1, "1.Jan,", "") + IF(MONTH(Order__r.Order_Date__c ) = 2, "2.Feb,", "") + IF(MONTH(Order__r.Order_Date__c ) = 3, "3.Mar,", "") + IF(MONTH(Order__r.Order_Date__c ) = 4, "4.Apr,", "") + IF(MONTH(Order__r.Order_Date__c ) = 5, "5.May,", "") + IF(MONTH(Order__r.Order_Date__c ) = 6, "6.Jun,", "") + IF(MONTH(Order__r.Order_Date__c ) = 7, "7.Jul,", "") + IF(MONTH(Order__r.Order_Date__c ) = 8, "8.Aug,", "") + IF(MONTH(Order__r.Order_Date__c ) = 9, "9.Sep,", "") + IF(MONTH(Order__r.Order_Date__c ) = 10, "10.Oct,", "") + IF(MONTH(Order__r.Order_Date__c ) = 11, "11.Nov,", "") + IF(MONTH(Order__r.Order_Date__c ) = 12, "12.Dec,", "") +
TEXT(YEAR(Order__r.Order_Date__c ))
CustomField.label: Year Month
